llmResponse.agenda_changes: No changes to agenda announced. President Lawson stated 'Changes to the agenda. We have a motion to approve it.' and the agenda was approved without any items being pulled, reordered, or added.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Do we have a motion to approve? So moved. Seconded. All those in favor? Aye.
